scripts.build:pages: npm run report && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/research && cp index.html app.js styles.css dist/ && cp -R data dist/data && cp research/dataset-visualizations.html dist/research/dataset-visualizations.html && if [ -d assets ]; then cp -R assets dist/assets; fi && touch dist/.nojekyll
scripts.test: node tests/data-integrity.test.js && npm run report && playwright test
